dsl_rule.translation_notes: Small Flag pattern translated as: (1) Strong trend detected via ADX>25, (2) Pause indicated by volume below 20-bar historical volatility, (3) Breakout direction matched to preceding trend direction via close comparison. Entry conditions detect the fast-moving trend and pause. Exit targets calibrated to historical average gains (16% bull) and losses (25% bear). Stop-loss set to break-even failure rates (2% bull). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on trend direction. Hold period set to 5 days typical for short-term flag patterns.

source_rule_text: Small Flag: A brief price pause within a fast-moving trend, followed by continuation in the original trend direction
